firmware.title: OnePlus Nord N10 OxygenOS 11.0.2.BE86AA is available
firmware.description:
OnePlus Nord N10 OxygenOS 11.0.2.BE86AA

A new software update is available for your Android Smartphone.

This release includes the following:

System

• Updated Android Security Patch to 2021.10

Network

• Improved the stability of the communication network

Please do not turn off your device while the update is installing. During Installation you cannot use your device at all, even to dial 9-1-1

firmware.title: 11.0.16.BE86AA is available
firmware.description:
New version: 11.0.16.BE86AA

A new software update is now available for your Android smartphone.

This release includes the following:

• Updated Android security patch to 2023-11-05

If you choose not to update now, the update will be automatically applied between 2AM and 6AM starting on November 22nd, 2023. Data rates may apply. Please refrain from turning off your device while the update is being installed. During the installation, your device will be temporarily unavailable, even for emergency calls to 9-1-1.
